$roomId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('players/red').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('players/red').val() === auth.uid || data.child('players/yellow').val() === auth.uid || (!data.child('players/yellow').exists() && newData.child('players/yellow').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('players/red').val() === data.child('players/red').val()))
